Query:
UNLOAD (SELECT upgrade.upgrade, count(*) AS change 
FROM (SELECT * 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata 
WHERE resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata.upgrade != 0) AS upgrade JOIN (SELECT * 
FROM resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata 
WHERE resstock_2024_amy2018_release_2_metadata.upgrade = 0) AS baseline ON baseline.bldg_id = upgrade.bldg_id 
WHERE baseline.applicability = true AND upgrade.applicability = true AND true GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1) 
 TO 's3://resstock-core/bsq_athena_unload_results/f0fd19e5ccae83ccc6560dfbbe579b1379bf7f941fc0ef5e0a42fb9f52eedff8/6243cf3a-1b3c-451b-bf68-bffa4cd8de2a/' 
 WITH (format = 'PARQUET')
